commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=87fd1d16fe44ebef47e1e399a9dc33371c62e3c7)
commands.review_summary:
The branch hardens agent runtime tool schema projection/quarantine before runtime normalization and adds focused regression coverage for unreadable tool entries and fields.

PR surface: Source +178, Tests +187. Total +365 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible: the PR filters unreadable tools in normalizeAgentRuntimeTools, while doctor and inventory callers do not pass the new diagnostics callback. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - A maintainer or PR author should decide and complete the sibling doctor/inventory coverage before this protected draft PR lands.

target.title: fix(agents): harden runtime tool schema quarantine
target.body:
## Summary

- harden runtime tool schema inspection so unreadable active tool entries or `name` / `parameters` getters produce diagnostics instead of crashing the turn path
- keep provider-normalizable object schemas available for provider-specific cleanup before final runtime projection
- make `openclaw doctor` report agent and bundle-MCP runtime tool load/normalization failures as `core/doctor/runtime-tool-schemas` findings instead of aborting the scan
- preserve the public mutable return shape of `inspectRuntimeToolInputSchemas`

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed, 2 routed shards / 42 tests
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts` passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts` passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed
- added-line private-name scrub found no forbidden reported plugin/tool name matches
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` passed clean, overall 0.82
- AWS Crabbox `run_287e25043e75`, lease `cbx_c002e6074950`, slug `silver-hermit`, provider `aws`, type `c7a.8xlarge`: `pnpm check:changed` passed selected `core` and `coreTests`; lease cleaned up
- after that remote gate, `origin/main` moved to `90329e28483f`; the branch rebased cleanly, the touched-file diff stayed unchanged, `git diff --check` and the private-name scrub still passed, and the focused Vitest/oxfmt/oxlint proof above was rerun on head `010fcecd1480`
- `origin/main` then moved once more to `a88e4fb7e05e`; the branch rebased cleanly again, the touched-file diff stayed unchanged, `git diff --check` and the private-name scrub passed, and the PR branch was force-pushed at final head `a93fb8a90653`
- `origin/main` moved again to `2fbddce88182`; the branch rebased cleanly, the touched-file diff stayed unchanged, `git diff --check` and the private-name scrub passed, and the PR branch was force-pushed at final head `f86bc3ebaeb1`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: a malformed or unreadable active plugin/tool schema can no longer crash runtime schema inspection, quarantine logging, or doctor runtime schema checks before producing a clear finding.

Real environment tested: local Codex worktree for focused Vitest/format/lint proof; AWS Crabbox Linux runner for `pnpm check:changed`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts --reporter=verbose`; `pnpm check:changed` on AWS Crabbox `run_287e25043e75`.

Evidence after fix: tests assert unreadable tool entries/fields are quarantined while healthy siblings remain usable, quarantine logging avoids re-reading bad entries, and doctor reports load/normalization failures as health findings.

Observed result after fix: focused tests passed 42 assertions, oxfmt/oxlint/diff checks passed, autoreview found no actionable defects, and remote changed gate exited 0.

What was not tested: no live Telegram/UI turn was run for this PR; the proof covers the runtime schema/doctor failure path with focused regressions and changed-gate checks.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
